title: SecTalks Brisbane CTF Cracknet Challenge

snippet: In this tutorial, i am going to solve “cracknet” challenge from SecTalks Brisbane CTF 2017.Click Here to download cracknet.exe.As we can see, the application prompts us to input a password, it also gives us 5 password guesses.Since we’re dealing with a .NET application, we can use dnspy to decomp...
